audit_items.proof_trace: The validation function is missing the required epoch range check: max(current_epoch - MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS, FULU_FORK_EPOCH). Only GENESIS_SLOT is validated (L135). The TODO comment at L134 confirms this is unimplemented, while dataColumnSidecarsByRoot correctly implements this check at L18-23.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends DataColumnSidecarsByRangeRequest with startSlot from epochs before max(current_epoch - 4096, FULU_FORK_EPOCH), bypassing validation. Node wastes resources attempting to serve data columns from epochs it's not required to retain, or serves incorrect partial data.
